title: 2026 Golden Globe Awards: Full List of Winners | Rotten Tomatoes
text: Best Performance By A Female Actor In A Motion Picture – Musical Or Comedy. Winner: Rose Byrne for 'If I Had Legs I'd Kick You'. Nominees: Cynthia Erivo, 'Wicked: For Good'; Kate Hudson, 'Song Sung Blue'; Chase Infiniti, 'One Battle After Another'; Amanda Seyfried, 'The Testament Of Ann Lee'; Emma Stone, 'Bugonia'. The Rotten Tomatoes coverage of the 83rd annual Golden Globes held on January 11, 2026, includes comprehensive coverage of all major award categories. Rose Byrne's win in the Best Actress (Musical or Comedy) category represents her first-ever Golden Globe victory despite previous nominations. The film 'If I Had Legs I'd Kick You' also received recognition in other categories at the 2026 Golden Globes.
